visa_types.overview:
Overview
 Exchange Visas may be issued to foreigners who are not older than 25 years of age and wish to participate in cultural, economic or social exchange programs administered by an organ of
                                                                        the State or a public higher educational institution in conjunction with an organ of a foreign state.
The validity period of an exchange permit depends on the length of the program for which it is issued and usually does not exceed 12 months. Exchange permits cannot be renewed or extended.
                                                                        Should you successfully apply for an exchange permit, you will not qualify for a temporary residence permit until you have lived outside the Republic of South Africa for at least
                                                                        12 months.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
 Exchange Visas may be issued to foreigners who are not older than 25 years of age and wish to participate in cultural, economic or social exchange programs administered by an organ of
                                                                        the State or a public higher educational institution in conjunction with an organ of a foreign state.
The validity period of an exchange permit depends on the length of the program for which it is issued and usually does not exceed 12 months. Exchange permits cannot be renewed or extended.
                                                                        Should you successfully apply for an exchange permit, you will not qualify for a temporary residence permit until you have lived outside the Republic of South Africa for at least
                                                                        12 months.

## Visa Fees
- Aside from visa fee, there is a VFS service fee of Php 2180
- Please
click  here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/phl/en/zaf/buy-services)
to find out more about the VFS additional services
*Note that these fees are payable in cash at VFS only until further notice

Applicants, submit your Application form with the photo format, as explained in the photo requirement (https://www.vfsglobal.com/one-pager/southafrica/philippines/english/images/pic.png).

visa_types.overview:
Overview
 Visitor Visa for Less than 90 days will be issued for the following purpose.
- Visits to family or friends and also for tourism purposes
- Business purposes
- Spouse to join a spouse who is in South Africa on a work or study permit
- Children to join parents who are in South Africa on work or study permits
- Fiancée/ fiancé to join his or her partner with the intention of marrying within 90 days
- Study purposes (max stay 3-months)
- Research
- Conferences
- To work in the production of a movie or show (i.e. in the entertainment industry)
- For medical purposes (max stay 3-months)
- Sport events
visa_types.full_text:

visa_types.overview:
Overview
 If you are a student and wish to study in South Africa you can apply for a study visa by completing Form BI-1738. 
Visas issued for studies at higher education and training institution shall be issued for duration of the course, but not exceeding four years;
Visas issued for studies at school shall be valid for the duration of the studies; provided that the duration for studies at the primary school shall not exceed eight years and for secondary
                                                                        school shall not exceed five years.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
 If you are a student and wish to study in South Africa you can apply for a study visa by completing Form BI-1738. 
Visas issued for studies at higher education and training institution shall be issued for duration of the course, but not exceeding four years;

                                                                        school shall not exceed five years.

- Passport, (valid for at least 30 days after the intended stay/departure date from South Africa; at least Two unused/blank visa pages)
- Fully completed visa application Form – 8 (DHA-1738) – must be completed in black ink and block letters.
Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3l22HUP8pg1HbFDfeBQaUl/9248e9127332f585ec2b170a0abe8019/DHA-1738-form.pdf)
- Application Form – 8 (DHA-1738) must be signed by the applicant and signature should match the signature on the passport.
- Proof of funds (Last 03 month’s bank statement signed and stamped by the bank with a balance of Philippine Currency .
- Letter from the applicant detailing purpose and duration
- Letter from the host organization confirming purpose and duration stay in RSA, disclosure of salary/stipend, declaration of support On organization letter head. Identity of the responsible
                                                                            person.
- A medical report completed on doctor’s letter head, Medical Report issued by registered medical practioner on letterhead with regard to applicant's general state of health. Report
                                                                            not older than 6 months at time of submission.
- A radiological report completed on doctor’s letter head, Radiological Report issued by a registered radiologist on letterhead certifying that the applicant has been examined by him
                                                                            or her with regard to active pulmonary TB signs. Report not older than 6 months at time of submission. Not applicable to under 12 years and pregnant women.
- Police clearance certificate from countries where applicants stayed for 12 months or more. Not older than 12 months.
- Vaccination certificate, (yellow fever) if applicant will travel through or stay in yellow fever belt. For the latest Yellow Fever Policy please
click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/2pOJ2cWIHBLrOa0qhYXp7g/67cd966360af3ab787f0735019bf1491/Yellow-Fever-Vaccination-Requirements-Doc-Recent.pdf)
- Copies of passport bio-data pages (photo page and address/parents page.
- Two recent (not older than 30 days/1 month) passport size, ( 35mm x 45mm of the picture) photographs
- Original covering letter signed by the applicant (should clearly mention who will bear the expenses of the trip)
- Flight Itinerary
- Accommodation proof

- There must be 7 working days before the proposed flight itinerary;
- All supporting documents should be duly certified by the Police in South African Commissioner or Commissioner of Oaths;
- Invitation letter from host in South Africa must be signed;
- For minors, certified copy of birth certificate, certified copies of both biological parents’ Passports (main page) and
an affidavit signed by both biological parents and certified by a Commissioner of Oaths (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3mqaOUVO7YN3WtF8Jlx9Fl/c96dff194e434d07e8dc6fe5f23c1244/Parental-Consent-Affidavit.pdf)

                                                                        issued for a period not exceeding three years.
